evals.prompt: Create a 3-slide presentation deck explaining what WebComponents are. Slide 1: Cover layout. Slide 2: Standard layout with a text list and a callout highlighting benefits. Slide 3: Split layout with standard components. Style slide 2's callout using standard theme colors. Do not write any custom styles, style attributes, or css files.
evals.expected_output: A clean HTML slideshow containing standard layout elements and no custom styles/attributes.

evals.prompt: Create a custom dark neon theme for html-deck. Save it as `theme-neon-custom.css`. The background should be pitch black (#050505), body text bright green (#10b981), primary accent hot pink (#ff007f), and secondary accent neon blue (#00f2fe). Write the theme in a separate file. You must only override CSS variables under the `:root` selector. Do not use element or class selectors. Show how to import it in a sample JS entry point after `html-deck/css`.
evals.expected_output: A CSS theme file named theme-neon-custom.css containing only :root variable overrides, plus a sample file showing the import.
